declarations.description: A web component that stores (and restores) values within the first form it contains.
declarations.name: FormSaverElement

members.name: retain
members.description: Space-separated list of field names (or ids as fallback) to retain after a successful form submission.

members.name: retainChoice
members.description: When present, injects an accessible opt-in retention checkbox into the form.

members.name: retainChoiceLabel
members.description: Plain-text label for the injected retention checkbox.

members.name: retainChoiceContainer
members.description: CSS selector for a container element into which the retention checkbox is appended.

members.name: storageKey
members.description: Optional explicit localStorage key override. When omitted the key is derived from the form's method and resolved action URL.

members.name: saveFormState
members.description: Serializes and persists the current form field values to localStorage.

members.name: restoreFormState
members.description: Applies previously saved field values to the current form.

members.name: clearSavedData
members.description: Removes the saved data for this form from localStorage.

attributes.name: retain
attributes.description: Space-separated list of field names (or ids as fallback) to retain after a successful form submission.

attributes.name: retain-choice
attributes.description: When present, injects an accessible opt-in retention checkbox into the form.

attributes.name: retain-choice-label
attributes.description: Plain-text label for the injected retention checkbox.

attributes.name: retain-choice-container
attributes.description: CSS selector for a container element into which the retention checkbox is appended. When omitted the checkbox is inserted before the first submit control.
